name: Baker's Truffles
recipeInstructions:
1. Melt the chocolate in a saucepan over very low heat, stirring constantly; allow to cool.
2. Cream the butter with the egg yolk. Gradually add the sugar, blending well.
3. Stir in the melted chocolate and vanilla extract until combined.
4. Chill the mixture until firm enough to handle.
5. Shape into balls about 1 inch in diameter.
6. Roll each ball in nuts; return them to the refrigerator to chill again.
7. Store the truffles in the refrigerator.
Makes about 30 candies.
